hero.title: 6 Decades of Medical Equipment Manufacturing, Supply, and Service Accountability
hero.description: Established in 1968 as a sterilisation system manufacturer, today PEIC combines Mumbai-based OEM manufacturing with authorised supply and integration support for 14+ partner global and Indian medical equipment brands across all hospital departments.

legacy.label: Our Legacy
legacy.title: Engineering-led from day one.
paragraphs: Precision Electronics Instruments & Components was established in 1968 to build sterilisation systems that hospitals, laboratories, and public institutions could depend on through years, even decades, of daily use.

PEIC is one of the 5 oldest currently operating Indian manufacturers to receive BIS licensing for its medical sterilization systems, back in 1976. Nearly six decades later, that record of continuous operation, compliance,  field performance, and long-term serviceability remains the foundation of the company.

From that manufacturing base, PEIC has grown into an authorised medical equipment supplier and integrator for 14+ global and domestic brands to support the entire hospital value chain through one accountable relationship: Today we cater to CSSD, OT, imaging, oncology, critical care, neonatal care, dental, ENT, diagnostics, labs,  research facilities, and several other departments. PEIC supports biomedical engineering and procurement teams across specification, authorised supply, installation, commissioning, documentation, AMC/CMC planning, and long-term post-sale service.

facilities_heading.label: Infrastructure
facilities_heading.title: Where the work gets done.

clients_heading.label: Key Client Relationships
clients_heading.title: Selected institutional references across India
clients_heading.description: PEIC has supplied and supported equipment for public health networks, municipal hospitals, national research institutions, railway hospitals, government departments, medical colleges, and private healthcare facilities across India for decades.
